label: 聚焦路径
description: 显式把 scene 的 focus 改到指定路径。tree 不变，仅 focus 不同。用途：手动定位节点，或在多层 fanout 后把 focus 重置回某个公共祖先。
description-en: Explicit refocus: keep the tree, change focus to the given path. Useful for manual targeting or resetting focus to a common ancestor after multi-level fanout.
icon: 一个十字光标停在树状结构的某个节点上，扁平插画风格，主色2种。

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: 路径
inputs.description: 目标路径（绝对路径，必须存在于 tree 中；'/' 代表根节点）
inputs.description-en: Target absolute path (must exist in tree; '/' means root).

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: scene
outputs.description: focus 已重置为 path 的 scene
outputs.description-en: Scene with focus set to path.
